title: Mildly Citrusy Italian Chicken Pasta
description: A halal-friendly Italian dish featuring miso-marinated chicken, white chocolate chips, and a citrusy twist, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, lemon juice, and olive oil to make the marinade.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix well to coat, then cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat a couple of tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat and cook the garlic until fragrant.
Add the marinated chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through.
Stir in the white chocolate chips until melted and well combined with the chicken and garlic.
Drain the pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing everything together to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste, then sprinkle with chopped parsley.
